# Astralo

> Astralo is a multilingual astrology website selling personalized horoscope readings delivered by email as digital PDF reports.

## Main URLs
- Home: https://astralo.online/
- Blog: https://astralo.online/blog
- RSS: https://astralo.online/rss.xml

## Commercial Pages
- Daily Horoscope: https://astralo.online/horoscope/daily
- Weekly Horoscope: https://astralo.online/horoscope/weekly
- Monthly Horoscope: https://astralo.online/horoscope/monthly
- Partner Horoscope: https://astralo.online/horoscope/partner
- Zodiac Sign Variants: https://astralo.online/horoscope/monthly/aries
- Localized Sign Variants: https://astralo.online/de/horoscope/monthly/aries

## What Astralo Sells
- Daily horoscope readings with short-term guidance
- Weekly horoscope readings with planning insights
- Monthly horoscope readings with deeper forecasts
- Partner compatibility readings based on birth data
- Sign-specific landing pages that map the four reading types to all 12 zodiac signs

## How Readings Are Created
- Astralo uses submitted birth data and product-specific astrology rules to create each personalized report.
- Readings are entertainment and reflection products, not medical, legal, financial, political, or religious advice.

## Public Content
- Astrology explainers
- Compatibility guides
- Monthly and weekly horoscope articles
- Birth chart education

## Contact
- Support: mailto:apollotechsro@gmail.com

## More
- Full guide: https://astralo.online/llms-full.txt
